response:
Your total food spending for May reached $833.96. This figure reflects a healthy balance between large-scale grocery stocking and enjoying the local dining scene in Seattle.
Food spending breakdown
Your spending was divided across seven specific transactions in your groceries and dining categories:
Groceries: $671.85 total. This includes your two "Costco food runs" totaling $501.23 ($286.41 on May 4 and $214.82 on May 19), plus essential stops at Safeway ($94.18) and Trader Joe's ($76.44).
Drinks & dining: $162.11 total. You visited Tavolata ($88.70), Oddfellows Cafe ($42.16), and Ramen Danbo ($31.25).
Your Costco trips accounted for approximately 60% of your total food budget. Utilizing bulk shopping for over half of your food needs is a strategic way to manage costs while ensuring your kitchen is well-stocked for the month.
